title: Scalable Cat's Force
body:
This is a library for mods written in [Scala](https://www.scala-lang.org/).

The forge library contained Scala runtime until 1.12, but it was removed in 1.13.

This library contains Scala runtime and Cats, which is a library for functional programming.
* Scala(https://www.scala-lang.org/) is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0. (https://www.scala-lang.org/license/)
* Cats(https://typelevel.org/cats/) is licensed under the MIT License(https://github.com/typelevel/cats/blob/master/COPYING).
